data_description.persistent_connection: Keep one long-lived BLE link to the panel and reuse it across polling cycles, like the official Android app. Reduces login/logout chatter and BLE setup overhead, at the cost of holding a connection slot continuously. Off by default (each poll is a full connect+login+logout+disconnect).
data_description.scan_interval: How often (in seconds) to read the panel's status. The panel closes idle BLE connections after roughly 10-15 seconds, so for persistent_connection to actually save GATT traffic this should be smaller than that window (try 8). Default 30 is fine for short-connection mode.
